leadText: Armor Cannon (Japanese: アーマーキャノン Armor Cannon) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Armarouge.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Armor Cannon deals damage and lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense stats by one stage each.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats. ZA The user attacks by shooting off its own armor as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats for a short time.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Armor Cannon is the only variation of Superpower to be a special move .
